title: LLM fallback context envelope
description: When a projctl step fails, projctl builds this envelope and invokes `projctl explain`. It is the ONLY context the LLM sees — not the full repo, not the full log, not any other step's output. All stdout/stderr must pass through the redactor (see audit_service) before assembly.

stdout_tail.description: Last 200 lines of stdout, redacted. If the original was longer, head is preserved with a '... <N> lines truncated ...' marker between head and tail.

stderr_tail.description: Last 200 lines of stderr, redacted. Same truncation rule as stdout_tail.

guide_section.description: Raw text of the matching section in guide.md for this step — gives the LLM the author's original intent.

previous_attempts.description: How many times the LLM has already been asked about THIS step for THIS invocation. 0 on first ask, capped at 3 in config.
